items.name: Savinelli 207 KS
items.note: Classic Italian straight billiard — a reliable everyday smoker with clean drilling.

items.name: Peterson Dublin Filter
items.note: Comfortable bent Dublin with the signature Peterson P-Lip stem.

items.name: Missouri Meerschaum Legend
items.note: American-made cob — perfect first pipe or knock-around for the porch.

items.name: Workshop Freehand No. 4
items.note: One-of-a-kind freehand with lively grain — ask staff to pull it from the wall.

items.name: Rattray's Bulldog
items.note: Faceted bulldog bowl with a sturdy vulcanite stem — classic club shape.

items.name: Country Gentleman
items.note: Bent cob with a longer stem for cooler smoking on warm evenings.

items.name: Sandblast Poker
items.note: Sit-down poker with a crisp sandblast — sits upright while you pour a drink.

items.name: Estate rotation
items.note: Cleaned estate pieces rotate through the shop — ask what is on the shelf this week.
